# Content Strategy — Riley Plumbing & Heating
*Auto-generated April 2026 from website scan. Review and customize with discovery call.*

## Goals for This Client
1. Generate 5+ qualified service leads per month from social media
2. Build local brand awareness and trust across Carson Valley
3. Establish credibility through before/after content and customer reviews

## Platforms
| Platform | Posting Frequency | Content Format | Primary Goal |
|---|---|---|---|
| Instagram | 3×/week | Reels + Stories | Brand awareness & leads |
| Facebook | 3×/week | Video + Posts | Local reach & booking |

## Content Pillars
Define 3–5 recurring content themes that cover both brand recognition and conversion.

| Pillar | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|
| 1. Education | How-to tips, maintenance advice, DIY warnings | "3 signs your water heater is about to fail" |
| 2. Before & After | Job transformation photos and videos | "We fixed this burst pipe in under 2 hours" |
| 3. Trust & Credibility | Reviews, certifications, team intros | "5-star review from a Gardnerville homeowner" |
| 4. Seasonal / Urgency | Timely prompts tied to season or weather | "Is your AC ready for summer?" |
| 5. Local Connection | Community involvement, local landmarks, area references | "Proud to serve the Carson Valley since 2003" |

## Hook Library
Running list of proven hooks to test and reuse.

- We found this inside a wall and the homeowner had no idea...
- This is what a new HVAC system actually costs in Carson Valley...
- Don't hire anyone until you watch this first...
- Most homeowners wait too long on this. Here's what happens...
- Your water heater is telling you it's about to fail — here's the sign...
- We swapped this out in Gardnerville and the family is saving $80/month...

## CTA Bank
Standard CTAs for this client — rotate to avoid fatigue.

- Get a free estimate — call (775) 293-8855 or link in bio
- DM us a photo and we'll tell you if it's urgent
- We're booking May jobs now — reach out before we fill up
- Comment your zip code and we'll let you know if we serve your area
- Tag a neighbor who needs to hear this

## Posting Schedule
| Day | Platform | Content Type | Pillar |
|---|---|---|---|
| Monday | Instagram & Facebook | Reel | Education |
| Tuesday | Instagram | Story | Trust & Credibility |
| Wednesday | Instagram & Facebook | Reel | Before & After |
| Thursday | Facebook | Post | Seasonal / Urgency |
| Friday | Instagram & Facebook | Reel | Local Connection |
| Saturday | Instagram | Carousel / Post | Before & After |
| Sunday | — | — | — |

## Monthly Focus
Summer AC prep — push HVAC tune-up bookings before the heat hits. Urgency angle: "Don't wait until it breaks on the hottest day of the year."
